title: Repo Registry
description: Canonical registry of child repositories accessible by alias. Fail closed if alias is unknown or not whitelisted. No freehand cloning — only via registry.

doctrine_version.description: Doctrine version this registry conforms to.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last registry update.

repo_alias.description: Short alias for phone/CLI use. Lowercase, 2-32 chars, alphanumeric + hyphens + underscores.

github_url.description: GitHub HTTPS or SSH clone URL. Must end in .git.

default_branch.description: Default branch for this repo. Used when WORK_PACKET does not specify target_branch.

allowed_branches.description: Branches the Garage is permitted to clone and mount. Fail closed if requested branch not in this list.

workspace_slug.description: Workspace directory slug for mount isolation. One workspace per repo.

enabled.description: Repo must be enabled=true to be mounted. Disabled repos fail closed.
